incident.title: Elevated checkout latency in demo service
incident.summary: Synthetic incident where checkout requests show elevated latency and intermittent dependency timeouts after a routine configuration change.

logs.message: Synthetic timeout while calling inventory-demo: deadline exceeded after 1500ms
Synthetic retry policy applied: attempt=2 backoff=200ms

changes.description: Synthetic connection-pool limit reduced for demo purposes

candidateCauses.label: Connection pool limit too low
supportingEvidence: Synthetic configuration change occurred shortly before the latency increase.
Slow spans point to dependency calls waiting near the timeout threshold.
contradictingEvidence: No direct synthetic pool saturation metric is available in the mock dataset.

candidateCauses.label: Downstream dependency degradation
supportingEvidence: Mock traces show deadline_exceeded responses from the dependency span.
contradictingEvidence: No independent synthetic alert from the dependency service is present.

dataGaps: Pool saturation metric is missing from the mock evidence bundle.
Dependency service health signal is not included.
No customer-impact sample is included because this is synthetic data.
